legend.automated: Verified in the authoring DOM by an it() block.
legend.deferred: Documented as it.skip() — requires login/activity bootstrap, OS file pickers (image/video), rich-text overlay/math render, runtime autoplay/navigation, Preview/Reader/Publish, persistence-after-reload, or accessibility flows.
